message:
feat(ui): add Analytics tab, collapsible tools, message navigation, and stats bar

Major detail modal and search view enhancements implementing beads
3nwtd.1.3 through 3nwtd.2.5:

Detail Modal — Collapsible Tool Calls (A.3):
- Add collapsed_tools HashSet to track which tool call indices are collapsed
- Tool calls render as one-line summary bars with triangle indicators
  (▶ collapsed / ▼ expanded) showing tool name and truncated first line
- Keyboard shortcuts: 'e' expands all, 'c' collapses all
- Auto-collapse all tool calls when detail modal opens via DetailOpened
- New CassMsg variants: ToolCollapseToggled, ToolExpandAll, ToolCollapseAll

Detail Modal — Session Metadata Header (A.4):
- Sticky header bar on Messages tab showing agent name (with accent color),
  workspace, source, timestamps, duration, message count breakdown
  (user/agent/tool/system), token count, and Unicode text sparkline of
  message activity distribution
- build_detail_header_lines() and build_text_sparkline() methods

Detail Modal — Enhanced Keyboard Navigation (A.5):
- detail_message_offsets RefCell tracking (line_offset, MessageRole) pairs
  populated during build_messages_lines() rendering
- {/} jump forward/backward between message headers
- [/] jump between user messages only (skip agent/tool/system)
- g/G for top/bottom (vim-style)
- New DetailMessageJumped CassMsg variant with forward/user_only params

Detail Modal — Per-Session Analytics Tab (C.1):
- New DetailTab::Analytics variant alongside Messages/Snippets/Raw/Json
- Shows: Overview (duration, tokens, cost estimate), Message Breakdown
  (role-colored bar chart), Activity Timeline (text sparkline), Message
  Length Distribution (stats), Tool Call frequency bars, Cumulative
  Content Curve (area sparkline)
- Tab bar updated to 5 tabs, tab cycling includes Analytics

Search View — Real-Time Stats Bar (B.2.5):
- Aggregate stats line at bottom of results pane: total hits, agent count,
  newest result date, mini sparkline of result timestamp distribution
- show_stats_bar bool (default true), togglable via StatsBarToggled message
- build_results_stats_line() aggregates from pane data

Hourly Explorer Granularity (B.3):
- Hourly Explorer now defaults to 7-day range and auto-falls back to
  Daily for longer zoom ranges

All snapshot tests updated to reflect new UI elements (tab bar with 5
tabs, stats bar, header changes). 20+ new tests added across all features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ╭Detail [Json] ↩───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮

+│  Messages  │  Snippets  │  Raw  │  ● Json  │  Analytics                              │
 │JSON Viewer                                                                           │
 │                                                                                      │
 │{                                                                                     │

 │Snippets                                                                              │
 │                                                                                      │
 │No snippets extracted.                                                                │
